---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---
```{r load packages}
library(readr)
library(here)
```

# Introduction
* About the data

The data was downloaded on April 8 2026 [link text](https://arcticdata.io/catalog/view/doi:10.18739/A25T3FZ8X)

# Setup

* Read in data

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
bg_chem <- read_csv(here('data', 'BGchem2008data.csv'))
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false
colnames(bg_chem)
str(bg_chem)
head(bg_chem)
summary(bg_chem)
```
# Analysis
* Summary Statistics 
```{r}
nitrate <- mean(bg_chem$NO3)
nitrite <- mean(bg_chem$NO2)
amm     <- mean(bg_chem$NH4)
phos    <- mean(bg_chem$P)
```

```{r}
ratio <- (nitrate + nitrite + amm) / phos
```

* Redfield Ratio

The Redfield ratio for this dataset is approximately `{r} round(ratio)`

* Plot
```{r}
plot(bg_chem$P, bg_chem$NO2 + bg_chem$NO3 + bg_chem$NH4)
```
* Conclusion
